title: TheDeadAweking
body:
The undead Monster are back.

Discover the new dimension.

Defeat the Undead Golem and catch the new battleaxe or discover the 2° dungeon to get unic loot.

Explore all of the new 3 biomes with unic wood sets.

WARNING:

THIS IS A BETA RELEASE SO MANY MODS SHOULD BE INCOMPATIBLE. TEST IT BEFORE ADD INTO A MODPACK.

 

Let's have a good exploration.

Check out the Library and the Official [Discord](https://discord.gg/3s22Y7fH) server.

Let's enter "The Dead" dimension for discover the 3 new biome with unic woodsets and finda the structures with 2 boss with unic loot.Defeat enemies,discover all the biomes,Craft new items and more. You can craft the mod wiki in-game wich let you discover all the new recipes, the boss stories and the biomes secretes.
P.S:"I RECOMMEND USE THE WIKI WITH THE GUI A LITTLE SMALL BECDAUSE IF YOU HAVE EMI/JEI/REI INSTALLED THE BLOCKS WILL OVERRIDE THE GUI."
